content.en:
After some more years, Ye Tian stabilized the realm of the fifth realm, and only then did he get out.

"Congratulations to the Old Ancestor for breaking through the Fifth Realm!"

"Congratulations to the Old Ancestor for breaking through the Fifth Realm!"

"Congratulations to the Old Ancestor for breaking through the Fifth Realm!"

Many Terran powerhouses are extremely excited, this is the fifth realm, the most powerful on this side of the Five Thousand Realm is only the fourth realm, but the old ancestor has broken through the fifth realm.

Now, the Terrans have completely crushed all the forces on this side of the 5,000-level territory and become the first overlord-level extradimensional force.

......

In the Five Thousand Territory, the Fourth Realm of the Nine Colored Chamber of Commerce, the Multidimensional Realm Rivers and Mountains, the Immortal Ancient Sect and other extra-dimensional forces came to congratulate the Terran Race and sent a large number of gifts.

They were also afraid that the Terrans would destroy them.

They had also been to the 4000 Territory, and they also knew how powerful the Fifth Realm was, even on the 4000 Territory, the Fifth Realm was also the top existence.

They had never seen the Fifth Realm, but they could imagine a little that after Ye Tian broke through the Fifth Realm, his strength far surpassed them, and he could definitely kill them easily.

Therefore, they did not dare to offend the Terrans.

The human race was excited, but Ye Tian was not so excited.

Even if he breaks through to the fifth realm, he still hasn't been able to survive the multi-dimensional tribulation of death, his strength is still a lot behind, and he needs to continue to improve his strength.

Afterwards. 900 Ye Tian replaced all the copied bodies with the Fifth Realm.

"After breaking through the fifth realm, my soul will has stepped into the tenth dimension, and the dimensional body is ten times stronger than the previous physical body, but unfortunately those soul will refining methods are of little use to me now, and I still need to create a better soul will refining method. "

Then he went into retreat again.

This time, he wanted to break through the body of the black mother and the ten-dimensional celestial body to the fourth layer realm.

At the same time, he also knew that if he wanted to fuse two innate multi-dimensional dao bodies, he had to comprehend the rules of the two dimensions, and if he wanted to fuse the three innate multi-dimensional dao bodies, he had to comprehend the rules of the three dimensions.

According to the introduction of the machine spirit Xiaoguan, his former master, the Heavenly Dimension Realm Master, comprehended the rules of the sixfold dimension, fused the six innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies, and coupled with the supreme mastery of the five realms, this can be called the invincible of the fifth realm.

Therefore, when his dimensional rules become more and more powerful in the future, the Three Black Secret Method will undoubtedly be of little use.

But for now, it's still useful.

Among the treasures left behind by the Heavenly Dimension Realm Lord, there are many that can enhance the innate multi-dimensional Dao body.

With the help of these resource treasures, Ye Tian easily raised the body of the black mother and the ten-dimensional celestial body to the realm of the fourth layer, making his body stronger and tougher, and his strength was raised to a higher level again.

In the days that followed, Ye Tian used the multi-dimensional silver fir to refine the soul will, but the effect was not very fast.

In addition, he also used the things of the dimensional rules to comprehend the dimensional rules, and with the help of the multi-dimensional wisdom light and the multi-dimensional treasure mirror, the efficiency of his comprehension was quite fast, but if he wanted to comprehend the two-dimensional rules, it would take a long time.

this day.

Ye Tian took out a black statue, which was obtained from the relics of the Kun Bronze Realm Lord, and the treasure left over from the third realm, which he had not been able to study before.

Now, he was already in the fifth realm, and when he thought of this treasure again, he didn't believe that he couldn't study it.

He pinched it, but it still didn't crush it, obviously the material was very extraordinary, and even the fifth realm couldn't crush it.

Then, he studied it for a while, but still had no clue.

"Maybe you can ask Xiao Seki. "

He summoned the machine spirit Xiaoguan and asked, "Xiaoguan, do you know what this is?"

Machine Spirit Xiaoguan looked at the black statue and was suddenly shocked: "Master, you are so lucky, you actually obtained this treasure!"

"What is this?"

Ye Tian's heart was full of expectations, and it could be seen from Xiao Guan's tone that this was a good thing!

Xiao Guan introduced: "This is a dimensional treasure! The dimensional treasure is a treasure that overrides the rules of the dimension, which can not only assist in comprehending the rules of the dimension, but also contains the origin of the innate dimension, which can help the fifth realm to impact the sixth realm!"

"In other words, with this Innate Dimension Origin, it will be easy for me to impact the Sixth Realm in the future?"

Ye Tian was shocked.

"Yes, master!" Xiao Guan said: "The reason why the previous master was unable to break through to the sixth realm was that he lacked the origin of the innate dimension, otherwise, it would be easy to break through the sixth realm. Unexpectedly, master, you actually obtained a dimensional treasure!"

Ye Tian was also puzzled, how could the Kun Bronze Realm Lord of the Third Realm have this treasure?

This is a treasure that has a huge effect on the fifth realm, and it will even cause the robbery of the sixth realm, such a good thing, the third realm naturally can't study it.

If it was researched, the Kuntong Realm Lord would have risen on his own.

"Master, this should be during the Multidimensional Tribulation, there was some kind of change in the twelfth dimension, causing this dimensional treasure to fall into the reality dimension, and it was obtained by the master. Otherwise, it would be impossible to obtain such a treasure. Xiao Guan guessed.

"Well, yes, the eleventh dimension has a chance to give birth to something with dimensional rules, and the twelfth dimension has a chance to give birth to a dimensional treasure, but it is too difficult to enter the twelfth dimension, and the former master can't enter it, only the sixth realm or extremely rare multi-dimensional life has the hope of entering the twelfth dimension. Xiaoguan introduced.

"How to use it?"

Ye Tian asked.

Xiao Guan began to instruct Ye Tian: "Use your one-dimensional rules to cooperate with the soul will to continuously integrate into this dimensional treasure, and after a long time, you will have a sense, and then follow the induction to continue to integrate the one-dimensional rules and soul will, about hundreds of extra-dimensional epochs in the past, you will be able to recognize the master, and then you can use it to comprehend the dimensional rules." "

"Okay, Xiaoguan, thank you so much!"

Ye Tian began to refine this dimensional treasure according to the method that Xiao Guan said.

Time passed, and before I knew it, six hundred extradimensional epochs had passed.

Finally, on this day, Ye Tian successfully refined and recognized this dimensional treasure.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian's soul will entered the internal dimension of the Dimensional Supreme Treasure statue, and the effect of comprehending the dimensional rules here was too good, as if he had witnessed the origin of all dimensional rules.

The effect of this kind of enlightenment is far beyond that of things that rely on dimensional rules!

"Maybe it won't be too long before I can comprehend the rules of the dual dimension!!!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.
